findings.summary: hackrf-one PCB: copper_layers_used includes F.SilkS (non-copper layer), SMD count may be slightly inflated, no RF/impedance analysis for this RF-heavy board

correct.description: Footprint count (321) matches visual inspection of the hackrf-one board
Track segment count (4403) and via count (1173) consistent with dense 4-layer RF design
Board dimensions 120.9mm x 74.8mm match known hackrf-one form factor
DFM tier correctly identified for this production board
Power net routing analysis captures major power rails

incorrect.description: copper_layers_used=5 includes F.SilkS which is not a copper layer. hackrf-one is a 4-layer board (F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu)

missed.description: No RF impedance analysis despite this being an SDR (Software Defined Radio) board with critical 50-ohm RF traces
No differential pair analysis despite USB and RF differential signaling

suggestions: Filter copper_layers_used to only include layers matching *.Cu pattern
Add RF impedance analysis for boards with SMA/RF connectors
Add differential pair detection for USB and high-speed signals
